title: rebutia neumanniana
intro: Rebutia neumanniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae, native to Bolivia. This cactus is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Rebutia neumanniana include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rebutia neumanniana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
